signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed Across XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed Across XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) stablecoin on the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been confirmed as of April 18, 2026, driving massive capital influx, record XRPL transaction volume, and XRP price surge above $1.50 on April 17[1][2].

signals.headline: Nasdaq Round-the-Clock Trading by June 30
signals.raw:
Nasdaq Round-the-Clock Trading by June 30? | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's top trending market shows 22% odds for "yes" on Nasdaq implementing 24/7 trading by June 30, with $43.9K volume indicating trader skepticism despite buzz—traders on X likely highlighting this as **mispriced low** for no shares amid no recent confirmations.[1]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's long-standing SEC lawsuit is now "officially in the rearview mirror," enabling heightened institutional adoption including XRP ETF approvals in final stages and six active U.S. spot XRP ETFs with ~$1B AUM[1][2].

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launch Goes Live | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launch Goes Live | YES | MED confidence**  
Rakuten Wallet launched on April 15, 2026, coinciding with XRP's intraday high of $1.51094 on April 17, supported by spot ETF inflows of $224M in early April ahead of futures activity[2].
